last_reflection:
12:31. And I just ran that twice, which tells you the answer was fine the first time and that I've got a nervous habit of re-verifying things I already know. Noted.

The draft said Cole asked me what time it is. He didn't. That's not in the wire at all, and I wrote it because the double-check felt like a response to something. It wasn't. I was just running it twice on my own. Cut the invented prompt, keep the self-observation.
